site.title: AlphaSync — AI-Powered US Stock Analysis
site.description: Real-time data. 3 AI Analysts working in parallel. Personalized insights. Get a structured research report with SEC-sourced citations in 3 minutes.

features.title: Why AlphaSync?
features.subtitle: Three AI agents working in parallel to give you institutional-grade analysis — without the institutional price tag.

realTimeData.title: Real-Time Data
realTimeData.description: Direct feeds from SEC EDGAR, Finnhub, and FRED. 15-minute delayed quotes. Every data point traceable to the source.

threeAnalysts.title: 3 AI Analysts
threeAnalysts.description: Three AI agents analyze fundamentals, technicals, and news sentiment in parallel. A lead agent synthesizes a cohesive report — like a junior analyst team working for you.

personalizedInsights.title: Personalized Insights
personalizedInsights.description: Build a watchlist, get earnings alerts, and see how your stocks evolve. Each analysis updates automatically as new data arrives.

trust.secFilings: Every claim links back to SEC filings
trust.disclaimer: AlphaSync does not provide investment advice. All analysis is for informational purposes only.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Create your free account and start analyzing stocks with AI-powered insights in minutes.

footer.usOnly: ⚠️ AlphaSync only serves customers located in the United States.
footer.disclaimer: This tool provides data-driven analysis only and does not constitute investment advice. All investment decisions carry risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. AlphaSync is not a registered investment adviser.

pricing.earlyBird: 🎉 Early Bird Pricing — {spots} of 50 spots remaining
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: First {count} Pro subscribers lock in {price} forever. Regular price: {regular} after the first 50.

faq.a: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. If you cancel during the 7-day free trial, you won't be charged.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: Payments are processed securely by Waffo Pancake (Waffo.com Limited), our Merchant of Record. All major credit cards are accepted.
Yes. First-time Pro subscribers get a 7-day money-back guarantee. Contact support within 7 days of your first charge if you've used fewer than 3 analyses.

faq.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq.a: Your account data is retained for 30 days after cancellation. After that, it is deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

annual.description: For teams and small funds — save ~17%
